summary: ANDROID | FALCON | DFU - After succesful DFU previous FW version is displayed on Home page and settings page
scenario: After a successful DFU, the firmware version displayed on the Home screen and settings page does not update until the app is restarted.
description_clean: After a successful DFU (Device Firmware Update), the previous firmware version is still displayed on the Home screen and device settings page. The correct firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
steps: Perform a successful Device Firmware Update (DFU).
Observe the firmware version displayed on the Home screen.
Observe the firmware version displayed on the device settings page.
Observe the firmware version displayed on the Home screen and device settings page again.
expected: After a successful DFU, the new firmware version should be displayed immediately on the Home screen and device settings page without needing to restart the app.
actual: After a successful DFU, the previous firmware version is still displayed on the Home screen and device settings page. The correct firmware version only appears after restarting the app.
